recommendations.title: Sex and Lucía
recommendations.overview: Various lives converge on an isolated island, all connected by an author whose novel has become inextricably entwined with his own life.

recommendations.title: 7 Days in Havana
recommendations.overview: A lesbian, an aspiring actor, an aspiring singer, a low-class marriage, a neighborhood community and 2 renowned directors have memorable less-than-24-hour-long experiences while living in/visiting the capital of Cuba.

recommendations.title: Set It Up
recommendations.overview: Two overworked and underpaid assistants come up with a plan to get their bosses off their backs by setting them up with each other.
